scripts.setup: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest && go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@latest && go mod download
scripts.clean:full: rimraf -v -I server data frontend/dist frontend/node_modules node_modules
scripts.build:backend: cross-env CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o server && cpy server . --rename=server.exe
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
